use_cases: Toggling between light and dark modes in web applications
Theme preference switching in user settings interfaces
Implementing dark mode functionality in SaaS dashboards
Accessibility feature for reducing eye strain in various UI contexts
ai_summary: An animated theme toggle button component that smoothly transitions between sun and moon SVG icons when clicked, enabling light/dark mode switching. Built with Framer Motion for fluid scale and path-length animations, featuring a minimalist outline button with clean stroke icons.
